name: Machine Elves
notes: Small/fast entities that 'construct' or manipulate reality.

name: Hat Man / Shadow Watcher
notes: Dark silhouette watcher; overlaps sleep-paralysis folklore.

name: The Void / White Light
notes: Objectless state: pure being / blank infinity.

name: The Nursery
notes: Playful room with impossible objects; shown to the traveler.

name: Honeycomb / Hex Grid Overlay
notes: Hexagonal tiling overlay perceived as structural layer.

name: The Pop / Snap
notes: Sudden click that marks a mode switch.

name: Carrier Wave (Audio Rise)
notes: Rising tone/vibration preceding transition; Round 2 will test correlations.

name: Zipper / Fold / Peel
notes: Reality unzips/peels; Round 2 will categorize what's behind it.

name: More real than real
notes: Underlayer felt higher fidelity than baseline.

name: Unconditional Benevolence
notes: Love perceived as an ambient field.
